name: Built-in accounting module
description: Lightweight ledger interface for small shops. Invoice, payment, expense, sales-tax rate, and customer-side accounting CRUD. Substitutes for external accounting integration in standalone mode.

name: Built-in full general ledger
description: Full GL machinery: chart of accounts, journal entries (manual/recurring/reversing), period close, bank reconciliation, year-end roll, depreciation, multi-currency revaluation. Currently no application implements this module — it exists in the test catalog so the corresponding test cases can be filtered cleanly.
